name: Freedom Holding Corp.
summary: Freedom Holding Corp. (FRHC) is a Nevada-incorporated holding company whose subsidiaries provide securities brokerage, securities dealing, market making, investment research, retail and commercial banking, and insurance products. Operating primarily in Kazakhstan and across Europe, Asia, and North America, the company also offers payment processing, entertainment and travel ticketing, e-commerce, and telecommunications and media services. Its digital platform includes Freedom SuperApp, an all-in-one financial platform for banking, payments, and investments.
